markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review Sunbit's content program and address reporting gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Reporting Gap Closed:** Sunbit was unaware of their existing Scrunch dashboard for tracking LLM performance. Andi provided immediate access and began customizing it with Sunbit's input.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [**Publishing Unblocked:** Webhooks are now live, enabling automated blog publishing. This will clear a large content backlog and increase publishing velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [**New Project Scope:** Sunbit is launching `Sunbit.ai` in mid-November. This new site requires content for a B2B audience (investors, analysts, tech talent), distinct from the consumer/merchant focus of `Sunbit.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [**Strong Performance:** Organic traffic is up 64% this year. Content volume and quality are high, with the main friction point being account management transitions.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Reporting & Visibility Gaps

  - [Sunbit's primary need was a reporting dashboard to track performance beyond GA4, specifically for:](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Search index metrics (e.g., Surfer SEO data, keyword density).](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
      - [LLM pickup (mentions, citations).](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [This gap was attributed to multiple account manager transitions.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)

### Solution: Scrunch Dashboard & Customization

  - [Andi revealed Sunbit's existing Scrunch dashboard, which tracks LLM performance by pinging models with prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Live customization was done to align the dashboard with Sunbit's strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
      - [**Competitor Added:** `Cherry Technologies` (`withcherry.com`).](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
      - [**Topic Added:** `patient financing`.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [**Persona Created:** `Dental Office Manager` (key decision-maker for financing).](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
      - [**Prompts Generated:** New LLM prompts were created based on the new persona.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)

### Context: Content Strategy & Publishing

  - [**Automated Publishing:** Webhooks are now live, enabling automated blog posting. This will clear a large content backlog and increase publishing velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [**LLM Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
      - [**Goal:** Write B2B content primarily for LLM consumption, not human readers.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
      - [**Tactic:** Adding JSON schema to WordPress page headers to improve LLM discoverability.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [**Tactic:** Removing em dashes and Oxford commas to avoid AI-generated content signals.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)
  - [**Social Media:**](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
      - [The automated social pipeline is paused while Sunbit defines its video-heavy social strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
      - [Reddit is a potential channel, as LLMs reference it for "human conversation." Sunbit is monitoring existing mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)

### New Project: `Sunbit.ai`

  - [**Launch:** Mid-November 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [**Audience:** Investors, analysts, media, tech talent (not consumers/merchants).](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [**Content Focus:** Machine learning and AI in finance.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [**Tech Stack:** WordPress, mirroring the `Sunbit.com` setup.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [**Reference:** Andi suggested `tech.growthx.ai` as a model for this type of B2B content.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)

### Performance & Relationship Feedback

  - [**Relationship:** 7/10 (due to account manager transitions).](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [**Velocity:** 9/10 (high volume of content).](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
  - [**Content Quality:** 9/10 (excellent, with minor style tweaks requested).](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)
  - [**Performance:** 9/10 (organic traffic up 64% this year).](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1878.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi:**](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
      - [Set up a Looker dashboard for Sunbit by next week.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
      - [Update the Scrunch dashboard with the new competitor, topic, and persona.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
      - [Connect Jason with Marcel to discuss content for the `Sunbit.ai` launch.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [**Edisham:**](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
      - [Begin using the updated Scrunch dashboard in weekly reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
      - [Test the new automated publishing webhooks.](https://fathom.video/share/q5kzs2m6SZsj9AeignYvRpJvcPDgygAE?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
